name: Pasta e Fagioli (Pasta and Beans)
recipeIngredient: 6 - 7 fresh tomatoes; cut into large pieces OR
1 can Tomatoes; cut into large pieces, reserve liquids (28 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the carrots, celery, onion, and garlic. Cook for about 5 minutes until vegetables are slightly softened.
3. Stir in oregano, basil, salt (1/2 teaspoon), pepper (1/4 teaspoon), and bay leaf. Cook for another 10 minutes.
4. Add the drained beans and cook for an additional 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. If using fresh tomatoes, add them now along with most of the reserved liquid from the beans and tomatoes. Stir to combine and simmer for about 10-15 minutes, adding more salt and pepper as needed.
6. Cook the macaroni in a large pot of boiling salted water until just tender (about 8-10 minutes). Drain well.
7. Combine the cooked macaroni with the bean mixture, adding any remaining reserved liquid to reach about 1 cup total.
8. Stir in Parmesan cheese and serve.
This would equal approximately 3/4 cup dried beans; soak and cook according to package directions. Note: Navy or pea beans work equally well.
